settings.heading: Game-changing convenience
settings.text:
We offer express delivery within 2 hours across Muscat, all days of the week, 10am-10pm.

We’ll pick up and reuse our boxes, and the rest of our packaging is recyclable.Sustainable and responsible packaging is an integral part of our company strategy; we use suppliers including MULTIVAC, one of the leading providers worldwide of packaging solutions for food.

All orders are delivered within 2 hours across Muscat 10am-10pm daily, orders confirmed after 10pm are delivered 9am next day.

settings.heading: Is there a delivery minimum?
settings.text: No minimum order value and our standard delivery fee is OMR 0.890bz.

settings.heading: When do you deliver?
settings.text: Express 2 hours delivery, all days of the week, of all fresh meat products across Muscat.

settings.heading: Grills and accessories delivery?
settings.text: All grills and accessories orders are fulfilled by our partner Casabella Oman in 24 to 48 hours. They work all days of the week except Friday.

settings.heading: Do I need to tip my delivery driver?
settings.text: There’s no specific requirement to tip your delivery driver — we are committed to paying a living wage that doesn’t depend on tips.

settings.heading: Where do you deliver?
settings.text: MLS products are currently available in Muscat.

settings.heading: Is there a refund Policy?
settings.text: Yes, if our meat is not up to your standards and not in good quality, we provide a 100% refund or give an option to replace it. Customer satisfaction comes first to us.
Have questions about your order, or a general enquiry?
